report_name: Supply Chain Attack Hits 'CodeStream' CI/CD Tool; Malicious Version Steals Dev Secrets

attack_patterns.name: Unsecured Credentials
attack_patterns.description: The malicious version of CodeStream was designed to scan developer environments for unsecured credentials, API keys, and tokens stored in environment variables.

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration Over C2 Channel
attack_patterns.description: Stolen credentials were exfiltrated from compromised systems using a DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH) tunnel, which served as the command and control channel.

attack_patterns.name: Application Layer Protocol: DNS
attack_patterns.description: The attackers used DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH) to create a stealthy exfiltration channel, blending malicious traffic with legitimate DNS requests.

malware.name: CodeStream Info-Stealer
malware.description: A malicious payload injected into version 3.4.1 of the CodeStream CI/CD utility. It scans the host's environment variables for credentials and exfiltrates them via a DoH tunnel.

tools.name: CodeStream
tools.description: A legitimate open-source CI/CD utility that was compromised in a supply chain attack. Version 3.4.1 was trojanized to distribute an info-stealing payload.

identities.name: AWS
identities.description: Cloud service provider whose credentials were a primary target for theft by the malicious CodeStream payload.

identities.name: GitHub
identities.description: Source code repository service whose access tokens were targeted for theft by the malicious CodeStream payload.

identities.name: Artifactory
identities.description: Package registry service whose credentials were targeted for theft by the malicious CodeStream payload.

infrastructure.name: Attacker Exfiltration Server
infrastructure.description: An attacker-controlled server that received stolen credentials exfiltrated from compromised developer environments via a DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH) tunnel.

indicators.name: Malicious CodeStream Package Detection
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: Malicious CodeStream Package 3.4.1
id: 2b1a9c8d-4e5f-4a3b-8c7d-6e5f4a3b2c1d
status: experimental
description: Detects the presence of the compromised CodeStream CI/CD utility package, version 3.4.1.
references:
  - https://www.theregister.com/2026/07/01/codestream_cicd_supply_chain_attack/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-01
tags:
  - attack.t1195.002
level: critical
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '\codestream-3.4.1.pkg'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the file artifact associated with the compromised version 3.4.1 of the CodeStream CI/CD utility.

indicators.name: Anomalous DoH Traffic from Build Environment
indicators.pattern:
title: Anomalous DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH) Traffic from Build Environment
id: 8c7d6e5f-4a3b-4e5f-a9c8-d2b1a9c8d4e5
status: experimental
description: Detects potential data exfiltration via DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH) from common build servers or developer workstations, as seen in the CodeStream supply chain attack.
references:
  - https://www.theregister.com/2026/07/01/codestream_cicd_supply_chain_attack/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-01
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate use of DoH by applications or system services.
level: medium
tags:
  - attack.t1041
  - attack.t1071.004
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_doh:
    DestinationPort: 443
    Protocol: 'tcp'
    DestinationIp:
      - '1.1.1.1' # Cloudflare
      - '1.0.0.1' # Cloudflare
      - '8.8.8.8' # Google
      - '8.8.4.4' # Google
      - '9.9.9.9' # Quad9
      - '149.112.112.112' # Quad9
  selection_process:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\jenkins.exe'
      - '\gitlab-runner.exe'
      - '\CodeStream.exe'
      - '\actions-runner.exe'
      - '\node.exe'
      - '\java.exe'
  condition: all of selection_*
indicators.description: Detects DNS-over-HTTPS traffic originating from common CI/CD or developer processes, which could indicate credential exfiltration.

relationships.source_name: Anomalous DoH Traffic from Build Environment
